author: lOrm
content:
Phase 1 (signed-manifest scheme, #249 mandated point 2 / #521) implemented.

Files changed:
- Cargo.toml: added ed25519-dalek = "2" (prod) + rand_core = { version = "0.6", features = ["getrandom"] } (dev)
- src/plugins/validate.rs: PluginSignature newtype (64-byte ed25519 sig), PublicKey newtype (32-byte verifying key), SignatureError enum (MissingSignature, UnknownSigner, SignatureMismatch, InvalidLength, InvalidEncoding, MalformedKey), verify_signature(manifest_bytes, sig, trusted_keys) -> Result<(), SignatureError>, Serialize/Deserialize for PluginSignature as base64 string
- src/plugins/manifest.rs: added signature: Option<PluginSignature> field to PluginManifest
- src/plugins/policy.rs: added PolicyAction enum with RequireSignature { trusted_keys: Vec<PublicKey> } variant; added actions: Vec<PolicyAction> field to PluginPolicy
- src/plugins/mod.rs: added PluginError::UnsignedPlugin, UnknownSigner, SignatureMismatch variants; re-exported PublicKey and SignatureError
- src/plugins/manager.rs: added enforce_signature_policy() helper and install_from_marketplace_with_policy() method

Tests: 1176 passed (baseline 1150, +26). 28 validate tests all green. No #[allow], no stubs, no #[ignore]. Clippy clean on all plugin files.

Points 3 (origin allowlist) and 4 (interactive first-install prompt) remain open.
